wins: Closed 10 reviewed audit findings across 5 repositories with full-repo test proof.
Preserved the abyss-stack source-vs-runtime boundary during mutation.
frictions: The cross-repo remediation route still requires heavy human owner judgment.
The audit-ingest and validation-matrix loop is repetitive but not yet automation-ready.

extracts.title: Audit-to-Closeout Proof Loop
extracts.summary: A reusable engineering practice for converting a bounded multi-repo audit into minimal fixes with explicit closeout proof through full per-repo pytest validation.
notes: The value is reusable practice and proof posture, not one leaf executable workflow.

extracts.title: Cross-Repo Audit Remediation Route
extracts.summary: A multi-step recurring scenario for ingesting a cross-repo audit, routing fixes by owner repo, and proving closure with full-suite validation across all touched repositories.
notes: The route spans several repos and verification surfaces, so it is broader than one skill.

deferrals.title: Automation scan handoff
deferrals.reason: The route is repetitive enough to scan, but not yet honest to call seed-ready.

deferrals.title: Quest promotion
deferrals.reason: No single repeated reviewed quest-shaped unit remains after donor split.

quest_hooks.reason: Broader donor harvest still dominates over final promotion triage.
